content: I think <#1304022107847659520> and <#1174185304027045969> should be 1 channel cuz art and meme transcends language
a voice channel for each language maybe

I've already investigated this for servers I've participated in, but sadly, Discord lacks the ability to combine two existing forums.   Starting from scratch means losing all messages from both forums.  

 The changes you see right now are a temporary fix in the server.  So you may see some channels/ category  out of place at times. The language roles we incorporated would play a major role in the server in the future.

Would a bot be able to mass refactor the channels and merge together that way?
A recursive function which copy from one channel then post it to another. It will be the bot posting instead of original poster but the bot can still give credit and their @
The server's four voice channels can be used across all language platforms.  Having 1 for each language will be to excessive.
Yes I have looked into this as well. And it can be done with a bot but it will take time.
I will look into it further, when the time comes <@452731110556696596> 🙏
